pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to support Java 17
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1.x does not support Java 17; compilation or runtime failures occur due to unsupported module access or removed APIs in JDK 17.
The project must target Java 17 to align with the migration goal; otherwise, the build may use incorrect source/target levels or fail to compile against JDK 17 features.
